headline: US Intelligence: Iran retains "thousands" of missiles after air campaign
summary: Investing.com -- New U.S. intelligence assessments suggest that Iran retains a formidable arsenal of thousands of ballistic missiles, even as the White House claims the regime’s military capabilities have been "functionally destroyed."

headline: Cresco Labs Opens Sunnyside Bridgeport, Expanding Access in the Ohio Valley
summary: CHICAGO, April 10, 2026--Cresco Labs Inc. (CSE: CL) (OTCQX: CRLBF) (FSE: 6CQ) ("Cresco Labs" or the "Company"), today announced the grand opening of Sunnyside Bridgeport, located at 435 Main Street in Bridgeport, Ohio. It’s the Company’s seventh dispensary in Ohio and 73rd nationwide.

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Colgate-Palmolive, Lowers Price Target to $102
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Bryan Spillane   maintains Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $105 to $102.
